title: hyperbaena standleyi
intro: Hyperbaena standleyi, also known as Mexican poppy or Mexican poppy tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits of Hyperbaena standleyi include relief from digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its use in treating respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Hyperbaena standleyi is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
